items.title:
[负面] [b] UPDATE [/b] 

Personally, I’m not interested i...
items.summary:
[b] UPDATE [/b] 

Personally, I’m not interested in continuing to focus on matters related to this game, but I feel the need to clarify and add a few points. I respect everyone’s thoughts and differing arguments, but I hope this is where the discussion ends.

First, the incident I mentioned did not take place on Discord but on a Chinese chat platform (QQ), which some of you were not involved in at all. The dev may have initially kicked out someone who said something inappropriate to him, but what he seems to be doing later is removing people he believed opposed his opinions or 'might' say something detrimental to him in the future.

Second, the dev (Xiaomao/Light) I referred to is the same person as the community manager. He claims to have "stepped back to focus solely on game development and no longer manages community affairs," rather than being removed from the team. Personally, I don’t concern myself with the dev’s moral standing or behavior as long as it doesn’t affect my gameplay experience. Unfortunately, it has. If he remains part of the team, I can’t help but question both his competence and the future development of the game.

Third, it’s important to understand that some countries have different cultural and legal attitudes toward matters of sexuality. Beyond whether the audience accepts such content, distributing it could potentially violate local laws.

Finally, I’m not sure if you’ve noticed the changes the producer has announced and then retracted over the past few days. While it’s true that they still consider players' feedback when making adjustments, if they lack the ability to address the core issues, this game still has little hope for the future.

[b] NOT RECOMMENDED [/b] 

[b] "The developer is absolutely INSANE." [/b]

This game had potential, but its future is ruined—by none other than its own creator.

After players criticized the developer’s constant pessimistic attitude about the game’s future in Chinese OFFICIAL GROUPS, the dev went on a rampage and kicked out hundreds of players in TEN groups. It didn’t matter who you were—hardcore strategists, top-paying veterans, talented fan creators, or early supporters who helped promote the game—everyone was thrown out. Then he claimed that he [i] would not allow [/i] the players to establish their own discussion group unless he approved.

And just when you think it couldn't get worse, the developer recently announced plans to release a [i] THAIS-THEMED SEX TOY (for male used) [/i] (yes, you read that right) in the official group. Naturally, anyone who opposed this decision was immediately kicked out as well.

This behavior speaks for itself. Do yourself a favor—stay far away from this game.

As someone who invested time, money, and enthusiasm into this game, it’s painful to watch the community and my fav characters be treated this way. A game lives or dies by its players, yet here the developer seems determined to alienate everyone.

items.summary: 傻逼游戏，一开始是被画风剧情吸引，甚至对爬墙一窍不通的我还专门捣鼓半天去谷歌下，上steam也是立马就开始玩，我是真的很喜欢里面的所有角色，但你游作为一个正经的全年龄卡牌策略游戏搞这种事，我们不明白你们赚不到钱吗，你明明可以去出正经的角色立牌设定集什么的，说什么人员不够产能不足，做斐济杯倒是产能足了？你游戏不把键帽开了迟早要死，当然现在离死也差不多了，我推在你们手里真可怜，现在这游戏真成我赛博案底了，祝早死

items.title: [正面] So far for what i been playing of this game it has...
items.summary: So far for what i been playing of this game it has been a really enjoyable experiance and i hope it continues developing and geting better and better, story makes me want to get characters what it has been a while gacha games made me do that, the characters art is awesome and beautifull, the gacha so far been really fair and the amount i pulled so far would make a number of gachas feel like really bad ones except for reverse 1999 and azur lane that game is also stupidly generous, the animations in combat are just so good as well, personally on tawil/Thais and helot-catena I WANT 24!! i totaly recomend this game to anyone that enjoys gachas fun gameplay good gacha good story and a lot of other fun stuff to do!
